Module 02

Confusable Pairs Lab

The word-pairs that decide NDA error-spotting marks. Each pair gets a full breakdown: meaning, the actual difference, a side-by-side table, the rule, exceptions, right-vs-wrong examples, a memory trick, and a PYQ-tagged practice set.
